---
title: "Systematic Review Bot"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header: _popover.html
---

![](images/systematic_review_robot.png){fig-align="center" width="85%"}

## Source File Viewer

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: file-list
:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
000_systematic_review_bot_system_instructions.md
:::

::: file-desc
System instructions to build a systematic review bot
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/000_systematic_review_bot_system_instructions.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
KB1_information_gathering.md
:::

::: file-desc
KB1: Collect desired search criteria
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/KB1_information_gathering.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
KB2_search_strategy_and_sources.md
:::

::: file-desc
KB2: Search strategies & available resources/tools
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/KB2_search_strategy_and_sources.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
KB3_study_selection.md
:::

::: file-desc
KB3: Selection criteria
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/KB3_study_selection.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
KB4_data_extraction.md
:::

::: file-desc
KB4: Extraction and table assembly
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/KB4_data_extraction.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
KB5_data_synthesis_and_reporting.md
:::

::: file-desc
KB5: Narrative synthesis
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/KB5_data_synthesis_and_reporting.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
KB6_writing_style_requirements.md
:::

::: file-desc
KB6: Prompt for writing style
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/KB6_writing_style_requirements.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
KB7_citations_and_reference_style.md
:::

::: file-desc
KB7: Assemble bibliography
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/KB7_citations_and_reference_style.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
KB8_pubmed_queries.md
:::

::: file-desc
KB8: PubMed search strategy
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/KB8_pubmed_queries.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
KB9_openalex_queries.md
:::

::: file-desc
System instructions for conducting OpenAlex searches
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/KB9_openalex_queries.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
prisma.md
:::

::: file-desc
PRISMA Systematic Reviews Checklist
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/prisma.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::

:::::::: file-card
::::::: file-info
::: file-icon
.MD
:::

<div>

::: file-name
pubmed_openapi_annotated.md
:::

::: file-desc
Annotated YAML to access PubMed API using OpenAPI
:::

</div>
:::::::

<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover(&#39;bot/pubmed_openapi_annotated.md&#39;)">

⊞ Preview

</button>
::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

## Obtaining an NCBI API Key

1.  Navigate to [NCBI](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/) (<https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/>).

::: {.bot}
![](images/api_key_1.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

2.  If you don't have an NCBI account, you will be prompted to create one. Options include Google, Microsoft, ORCiD, or through your institutional nexus.

::: {.bot}
![](images/api_key_2.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

3.  Log in to your account.

::: {.bot}
![](images/api_key_3.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

4.  Click on [**Account settings.**]{style="color: #00468b; font-weight: 500;"}

::: {.bot}
![](images/api_key_4.png)
:::

5.  Create an API key.

::: {.bot}
![](images/api_key_5.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

6.  **NB:** Treat this API key like a password and keep it secure.

::: {.bot}
![](images/api_key_6.png)
:::

## Building Systematic Review Bot

1.  Download the source files.

    [Systematic Review Bot](assets/systematic_review_bot.zip){.btn .btn-primary download="systematic_review_bot.zip" style="border-radius:10px"}

2.  On the ChatGPT home page, click **GPTs** in the left sidebar.

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_1.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

3.  On the next page, click the Create button in the upper-right corner.

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_2.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

4.  Select **Configure**.

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_3.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

5.  Paste `000_systematic_review_bot_system_instructions.md` into the **Instructions** field.

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_new_4.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

6.  Upload the Knowledge Base files (`KB1–KB9`).

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_5.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

7.  Click Create New Action.

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_6.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

8.  Select **Authentication**.

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_7.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

9.  Choose API Key and paste your NCBI API key into the field.

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_8.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

10. Paste `pubmed_openapi_configuration.yaml` into the Schema field. Next, click the **Test** button for each API call type to verify that the requests work correctly.

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_9.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

11. Example of successful test output for the `esearchPubMed` call.

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_10.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

12. Click Save, then test the Custom GPT in the preview chat to ensure everything is working correctly.

::: {.bot}
![](images/system_bot_11.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

## Assembled Systematic Review Using [Prism](https://openai.com/prism/)

[Assembled Systematic Review](assets/Combined_Executive_Abstract_Main_Manuscript.pdf){.btn .btn-primary download="Combined_Executive_Abstract_Main_Manuscript.pdf" style="border-radius:10px"}
